etymology.description: phonetic 冎 + semantic 口 -> 咼
etymology.interpretation: The character 咼(咼) (guō) combines the phonetic component 冎(冎) with the semantic component 口(口) (kǒu, "mouth") to form a sound-related character, where 冎 provides the sound value while 口 indicates a connection to speech or the mouth. The character functions primarily as a phonetic element in more complex characters.
